title: The Last Straw
writer: Denison Clift, Charles Swickard, Harold Titus
actors: Buck Jones, Vivian Rich, Jane Talent
plot: Upon inheriting the H. C. Ranch, young Easterner Jane Hunter ventures West to take possession of her legacy. Soon after arriving, she appoints a cowboy named Hepburn as the foreman. Ranch hand Tom Beck suspects that Hepburn may be...
